title: Your New Car Lost $9,600 Before You Made a Payment
hook: The moment you drove off the lot, your new car shed nearly ten thousand dollars in value — before you even got home.
angle: Reframes 'buying new' as a hidden wealth tax; shows exactly how much depreciation costs across a lifetime and what to do instead.
audience: Anyone shopping for a car or driving a new one — people who think new cars are safer or better value
